## 🤖 Automated Review

This PR will be automatically reviewed by the multi-agent system:
- **Security Agent** - Checks for vulnerabilities and security issues
- **Performance Agent** - Identifies performance bottlenecks
- **Architecture Agent** - Reviews code quality and maintainability

The review will appear as a comment below within ~1 minute.
